nodes.label: Life cycle of a request in the prefill server  1. Bootstrap Queue     a. Init
Release the metadata buffer index allocated for a request in prefill disaggregat
Set max_new_tokens = 1, so PrefillAdder memory estimation is accurate
pop the reqs which has finished bootstrapping          return_failed_reqs: For
Mixin for Scheduler to handle disaggregation prefill
Pre-send STAGING_REQ so decode allocates staging during GPU forward.
A normal scheduler loop for prefill worker in disaggregation mode.
Transfer kv for prefill completed requests and add it into disagg_prefill_inflig
Poll the requests in the middle of transfer. If done, return the request.
Used by PP, get the transferred rids but **do not pop**
Send a prefilled chunk to the decode server
